name: @pryzm/ai-worker
description: PRYZM 2 — AI worker (S47 skeleton). BullMQ-style queue + handler registry behind a `createQueue({env})` factory mirroring the `createEventLog` selection pattern. v0 ships with `InMemoryQueue` (dev/test) and a `BullMqQueue` adapter loaded via dynamic import gated on `REDIS_URL`. Real Redis-backed live worker lands at S49+ when the `[strategic ADR-014]` AI host is promoted to L7.5 and the CV / generative workflows arrive.
